tools.name: applications.androidpublisherApplicationsDeviceTierConfigsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new device tier config for an app.

tools.name: applications.androidpublisherApplicationsDeviceTierConfigsGet
tools.description: Returns a particular device tier config.

tools.name: applications.androidpublisherApplicationsDeviceTierConfigsList
tools.description: Returns created device tier configs, ordered by descending creation time.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsApksAddexternallyhosted
tools.description: Creates a new APK without uploading the APK itself to Google Play, instead hosting the APK at a specified URL. This function is only available to organizations using Managed Play whose application is configured to restrict distribution to the organizations.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsApksList
tools.description: Lists all current APKs of the app and edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsApksUpload
tools.description: Uploads an APK and adds to the current edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsBundlesList
tools.description: Lists all current Android App Bundles of the app and edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsBundlesUpload
tools.description: Uploads a new Android App Bundle to this edit. If you are using the Google API client libraries, please increase the timeout of the http request before calling this endpoint (a timeout of 2 minutes is recommended). See [Timeouts and Errors](https://developers.google.com/api-client-library/java/google-api-java-client/errors) for an example in java.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsCommit
tools.description: Commits an app edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsCountryavailabilityGet
tools.description: Gets country availability.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an app edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsDeobfuscationfilesUpload
tools.description: Uploads a new deobfuscation file and attaches to the specified APK.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsDetailsGet
tools.description: Gets details of an app.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsDetailsPatch
tools.description: Patches details of an app.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsDetailsUpdate
tools.description: Updates details of an app.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsExpansionfilesGet
tools.description: Fetches the expansion file configuration for the specified APK.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsExpansionfilesPatch
tools.description: Patches the APK's expansion file configuration to reference another APK's expansion file. To add a new expansion file use the Upload method.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsExpansionfilesUpdate
tools.description: Updates the APK's expansion file configuration to reference another APK's expansion file. To add a new expansion file use the Upload method.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsExpansionfilesUpload
tools.description: Uploads a new expansion file and attaches to the specified APK.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsGet
tools.description: Gets an app edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsImagesDelete
tools.description: Deletes the image (specified by id) from the edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsImagesDeleteall
tools.description: Deletes all images for the specified language and image type. Returns an empty response if no images are found.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsImagesList
tools.description: Lists all images. The response may be empty.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsImagesUpload
tools.description: Uploads an image of the specified language and image type, and adds to the edit.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsInsert
tools.description: Creates a new edit for an app.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsListingsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a localized store listing.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsListingsDeleteall
tools.description: Deletes all store listings.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsListingsGet
tools.description: Gets a localized store listing.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsListingsList
tools.description: Lists all localized store listings.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsListingsPatch
tools.description: Patches a localized store listing.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsListingsUpdate
tools.description: Creates or updates a localized store listing.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsTestersGet
tools.description: Gets testers. Note: Testers resource does not support email lists.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsTestersPatch
tools.description: Patches testers. Note: Testers resource does not support email lists.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsTestersUpdate
tools.description: Updates testers. Note: Testers resource does not support email lists.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsTracksGet
tools.description: Gets a track.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsTracksList
tools.description: Lists all tracks.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsTracksPatch
tools.description: Patches a track.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsTracksUpdate
tools.description: Updates a track.

tools.name: edits.androidpublisherEditsValidate
tools.description: Validates an app edit.

tools.name: externaltransactions.androidpublisherExternaltransactionsCreateexternaltransaction
tools.description: Creates a new external transaction.

tools.name: externaltransactions.androidpublisherExternaltransactionsGetexternaltransaction
tools.description: Gets an existing external transaction.

tools.name: externaltransactions.androidpublisherExternaltransactionsRefundexternaltransaction
tools.description: Refunds or partially refunds an existing external transaction.

tools.name: generatedapks.androidpublisherGeneratedapksDownload
tools.description: Downloads a single signed APK generated from an app bundle.

tools.name: generatedapks.androidpublisherGeneratedapksList
tools.description: Returns download metadata for all APKs that were generated from a given app bundle.

tools.name: grants.androidpublisherGrantsCreate
tools.description: Grant access for a user to the given package.

tools.name: inappproducts.androidpublisherInappproductsDelete
tools.description: Deletes an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).

tools.name: inappproducts.androidpublisherInappproductsGet
tools.description: Gets an in-app product, which can be a managed product or a subscription.

tools.name: inappproducts.androidpublisherInappproductsInsert
tools.description: Creates an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).

tools.name: inappproducts.androidpublisherInappproductsList
tools.description: Lists all in-app products - both managed products and subscriptions. If an app has a large number of in-app products, the response may be paginated. In this case the response field `tokenPagination.nextPageToken` will be set and the caller should provide its value as a `token` request parameter to retrieve the next page.

tools.name: inappproducts.androidpublisherInappproductsPatch
tools.description: Patches an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).

tools.name: inappproducts.androidpublisherInappproductsUpdate
tools.description: Updates an in-app product (i.e. a managed product or a subscription).

tools.name: internalappsharingartifacts.androidpublisherInternalappsharingartifactsUploadapk
tools.description: Uploads an APK to internal app sharing. If you are using the Google API client libraries, please increase the timeout of the http request before calling this endpoint (a timeout of 2 minutes is recommended). See [Timeouts and Errors](https://developers.google.com/api-client-library/java/google-api-java-client/errors) for an example in java.

tools.name: internalappsharingartifacts.androidpublisherInternalappsharingartifactsUploadbundle
tools.description: Uploads an app bundle to internal app sharing. If you are using the Google API client libraries, please increase the timeout of the http request before calling this endpoint (a timeout of 2 minutes is recommended). See [Timeouts and Errors](https://developers.google.com/api-client-library/java/google-api-java-client/errors) for an example in java.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationConvertRegionPrices
tools.description: Calculates the region prices, using today's exchange rate and country-specific pricing patterns, based on the price in the request for a set of regions.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsArchive
tools.description: Archives a subscription. Can only be done if at least one base plan was active in the past, and no base plan is available for new or existing subscribers currently. This action is irreversible, and the subscription ID will remain reserved.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansActivate
tools.description: Activates a base plan. Once activated, base plans will be available to new subscribers.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansDeactivate
tools.description: Deactivates a base plan. Once deactivated, the base plan will become unavailable to new subscribers, but existing subscribers will maintain their subscription

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansDelete
tools.description: Deletes a base plan. Can only be done for draft base plans. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansMigratePrices
tools.description: Migrates subscribers who are receiving an historical subscription price to the currently-offered price for the specified region. Requests will cause price change notifications to be sent to users who are currently receiving an historical price older than the supplied timestamp. Subscribers who do not agree to the new price will have their subscription ended at the next renewal.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansOffersActivate
tools.description: Activates a subscription offer. Once activated, subscription offers will be available to new subscribers.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansOffersCreate
tools.description: Creates a new subscription offer. Only auto-renewing base plans can have subscription offers. The offer state will be DRAFT until it is activated.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansOffersDeactivate
tools.description: Deactivates a subscription offer. Once deactivated, existing subscribers will maintain their subscription, but the offer will become unavailable to new subscribers.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansOffersDelete
tools.description: Deletes a subscription offer. Can only be done for draft offers. This action is irreversible.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansOffersGet
tools.description: Reads a single offer

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansOffersList
tools.description: Lists all offers under a given subscription.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsBasePlansOffersPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing subscription offer.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new subscription. Newly added base plans will remain in draft state until activated.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsDelete
tools.description: Deletes a subscription. A subscription can only be deleted if it has never had a base plan published.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsGet
tools.description: Reads a single subscription.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsList
tools.description: Lists all subscriptions under a given app.

tools.name: monetization.androidpublisherMonetizationSubscriptionsPatch
tools.description: Updates an existing subscription.

tools.name: orders.androidpublisherOrdersRefund
tools.description: Refunds a user's subscription or in-app purchase order. Orders older than 1 year cannot be refunded.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesProductsAcknowledge
tools.description: Acknowledges a purchase of an inapp item.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesProductsConsume
tools.description: Consumes a purchase for an inapp item.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesProductsGet
tools.description: Checks the purchase and consumption status of an inapp item.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesSubscriptionsAcknowledge
tools.description: Acknowledges a subscription purchase.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesSubscriptionsCancel
tools.description: Cancels a user's subscription purchase. The subscription remains valid until its expiration time.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesSubscriptionsDefer
tools.description: Defers a user's subscription purchase until a specified future expiration time.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesSubscriptionsGet
tools.description: Checks whether a user's subscription purchase is valid and returns its expiry time.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesSubscriptionsRefund
tools.description: Refunds a user's subscription purchase, but the subscription remains valid until its expiration time and it will continue to recur.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesSubscriptionsRevoke
tools.description: Refunds and immediately revokes a user's subscription purchase. Access to the subscription will be terminated immediately and it will stop recurring.

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesSubscriptionsv2Get
tools.description: Get metadata about a subscription

tools.name: purchases.androidpublisherPurchasesVoidedpurchasesList
tools.description: Lists the purchases that were canceled, refunded or charged-back.

tools.name: reviews.androidpublisherReviewsGet
tools.description: Gets a single review.

tools.name: reviews.androidpublisherReviewsList
tools.description: Lists all reviews.

tools.name: reviews.androidpublisherReviewsReply
tools.description: Replies to a single review, or updates an existing reply.

tools.name: systemapks.androidpublisherSystemapksVariantsCreate
tools.description: Creates an APK which is suitable for inclusion in a system image from an already uploaded Android App Bundle.

tools.name: systemapks.androidpublisherSystemapksVariantsDownload
tools.description: Downloads a previously created system APK which is suitable for inclusion in a system image.

tools.name: systemapks.androidpublisherSystemapksVariantsGet
tools.description: Returns a previously created system APK variant.

tools.name: systemapks.androidpublisherSystemapksVariantsList
tools.description: Returns the list of previously created system APK variants.

tools.name: users.androidpublisherUsersCreate
tools.description: Grant access for a user to the given developer account.

tools.name: users.androidpublisherUsersDelete
tools.description: Removes all access for the user to the given developer account.

tools.name: users.androidpublisherUsersList
tools.description: Lists all users with access to a developer account.

tools.name: users.androidpublisherUsersPatch
tools.description: Updates access for the user to the developer account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
